creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
For graphics/gmic-qt stay:

"G'MIC-Qt is a versatile front-end to the image processing framework G'MIC.
It is in fact a plugin for GIMP, as well as a standalone application."

I did compile withut problem but there are no plugin for GIMP. It is just plugin for Krita. And there is no options to choose which plugin.

Thank you.

Lumiwa
